subcodes.first_line: O thou sincere servant of God! The nobility of the human world lieth in servitude at the divine Threshold, and freedom therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق الهی بزرگواری عالم انسانی در بندگی درگاه الهیست و آزادگی از این
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
